data.title: IFS named Customers' Choice in 2025 Gartner® Field Service Management Report. Only vendor with distinction.
data.description: In London on January 13, 2026, IFS, a top Industrial AI software provider, was named a Customers' Choice in the 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer: Field Service Management report. They are the exclusive company to earn this recognition. The achievement highlights their exceptional performance in delivering solutions for field service management.

data.description: In 2025, Ant International facilitated more than 2 billion digital cross-border transactions for merchants operating in key emerging markets.

data.title: ROE Visual marks 20th anniversary in 2026 as a leader in LED display tech for live events, touring, broadcast, & installation.
data.description: In Shenzen, China, on January 13, 2026, ROE Visual, a prominent figure in LED display technology for various industries like live events, touring, broadcast, and installations, is marking its 20th anniversary. The celebration carries the theme "Beyond Stages. Passion On." Over the years, ROE Visual has established itself as a global leader in the field, serving numerous clients with innovative LED display solutions.

data.title: Crypto bill update bans stablecoins from paying interest, a win for banks. Senate draft prohibits yield tied to stablecoin holding.
data.description: The revised market structure bill in the Senate now includes a provision that bans the earning of yield specifically related to the ownership of a payment stablecoin.

data.title: Stock market hits new highs with Dow and S&P 500 surging, Fear and Greed Index reaches "Greed" zone. Nasdaq up 0.3%, S&P 500 gained 1% last week, Dow and Nasdaq soared 2.3% and 1.9%. Gold and silver also surged to record highs.
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index displayed a notable improvement in market sentiment, shifting to the "Greed" zone on Monday. U.S. stocks experienced gains with the Nasdaq Composite rising approximately 0.3% in the session. Both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices reached new all-time highs. Last week, the S&P 500 saw a 1% increase, while the Dow and Nasdaq surged by 2.3% and 1.9% respectively. Gold and silver prices also reached fresh record highs on Monday amid investor concerns over the Federal Reserve's independence amidst a new political escalation. data.description: Stock futures in the U.S. are down slightly today, with investors eyeing certain stocks. Delta Air Lines Inc (NYSE: DAL) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of $1.53 per share on revenue of $14.73 billion before the market opens. data.title: Nigeria integrates crypto oversight with tax IDs in a wide reform, changing asset reporting in the economy.
data.description: Nigeria has implemented a tax reform that requires crypto exchanges to report user identities, changing the process of incorporating digital assets into the formal economy. This overhaul is a significant step in regulating the crypto market, aiming to bring more transparency and accountability. The move will affect all digital asset transactions in Nigeria, impacting a growing number of users in the country's expanding crypto market. The new reporting measures represent a shift towards tighter control and oversight in an industry that has seen rapid growth and innovation.

data.title: Former Congressman Sean Patrick Maloney named CEO of Coalition for Prediction Markets. Patrick McHenry is Senior Advisor. Washington, Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: A bipartisan coalition called the Coalition for Prediction Markets (CPM) is gaining expertise from former Members of Congress in regulatory policy, financial markets, and consumer protection. Established on January 13, 2026, in Washington, the group aims to maintain fairness and transparency in their operations. This move is set to enhance the group's capabilities in various areas by utilizing the knowledge and experience of these former legislators. The CPM is focused on regulatory matters, financial market activities, and safeguarding consumer interests. This development signals a strategic initiative by the coalition to strengthen its foundation and effectiveness by incorporating the skills of these ex-Congress members.

data.title: NWEA report provides guidance for schools on handling weather-related disruptions. Includes natural disasters recovery playbook.
data.description: Utilizing insights from past crises, a new natural disasters recovery playbook has been unveiled by NWEA, a K-12 assessment and research organization based in Boston. Released on January 13, 2026, this playbook aims to assist schools in lessening the effects of disasters on education. The initiative is crucial as instances of extreme weather events are on the rise, emphasizing the need for proactive measures. By leveraging experiences from previous emergencies, this playbook offers strategies to enhance resilience and continuity in education. It serves as a vital resource to navigate challenges, with the ultimate goal of safeguarding teaching and learning environments.

data.title: US patent applications drop by 9%, reaching a record low after peak last year; 2025 shows focus on sustainability in R&D.
data.description: The 2025 rankings show a significant emphasis on sustainability in research and development (R&D). Among the top 10 fastest-growing technologies, half of the patent areas are related to batteries. Additionally, there is a notable focus on recovering usable material from waste. This information is based on an annual patent study conducted by IFI CLAIMS, headquartered in New Haven, Connecticut. The study signifies a shift towards environmentally friendly innovations with a prominent presence of sustainable practices in R&D.

data.title: Under political pressure, Trump aims to address increasing housing costs. White House mulls ideas for a housing affordability plan at upcoming economic conference.
data.description: Officials at the White House have been considering numerous strategies for the president to unveil a housing affordability plan at an upcoming economic conference.
